arts.ttl: 15 cut-price players Chelsea can target this summer to fix Enzo Maresca's biggest problems
arts.sum: And whilst Todd Boehly and Co. have so often waved huge sums in the faces of selling clubs for their best talent in recent years, the largest amount of money is not exactly the answer to every single problem. Whilst football.london reported last November the club have no interest in Liverpool's Caoimhin Kelleher, the Irish goalkeeper is another who is out of contract next year and could be sold for a lower price as a result.

arts.ttl: Gyokeres transfer BOMBSHELL: Chelsea rekindle interest in Man Utd target
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly rekindled their interest in Sporting CP centre forward Viktor Gyokeres amid their search for a new striker this summer. Ipswich Town star Liam Delap is believed to be Chelsea ’s priority target following his immense start to life in the English top flight, although the Blues are also interested in signing Gyokeres, according to GiveMeSport .

arts.ttl: Chelsea lining up to snap up ‘super talent’ – Already presented ‘concept’ to entourage
arts.sum: Chelsea are chasing German U19 ‘super talent’ Kofi Jeremy Amoako from VfL Wolfsburg as they continue targeting top talent. That’s according to BILD, who report that Chelse have been watching the 19-year-old this season as he’s impressed on loan at VfL Osnabrück. He joined 3.
